Description: Start with mobile design, then enhance for larger screens. Easier than scaling down.
Interactive elements should be at least 44x44px on mobile. Ensures easy tapping.
Use clamp() for fluid typography that scales smoothly between breakpoints.
Use clamp() or container queries for fluid spacing that adapts to container size.
Use breakpoints based on content needs, not device sizes. Common: 640px, 768px, 1024px, 1280px.
Use container queries (@container) for component-level responsiveness. More flexible than viewport queries.
Content should not overflow horizontally on any viewport size.
Layouts should work when users increase text size to 200%. Test with browser zoom.
Don't hide critical functionality on mobile—adapt the interface. Don't amputate features.
